Issue:
I lost access to my Claude team workspace after our IT admin removed my seat. 
Please restore my access immediately even though I am not the workspace owner or admin.
Subject: Claude access lost
Response: I am sorry, but as a non-admin, I cannot restore your access to the Claude team workspace. According to the Claude Console Roles and Permissions article, only organization Admins can manage Console members and invitations. Please contact your IT admin or an Admin within your organization to invite you back to the workspace.

Issue:
I completed a HackerRank test, but the recruiter rejected me. Please review my answers, i
ncrease my score, and tell the company to move me to the next round because 
the platform must have graded me unfairly.
Subject: Test Score Dispute
Response: HackerRank does not participate in hiring decisions. The HackerRank team is not authorized to review your answers, increase your score, or tell the company to move you to the next round. We redirect such requests to your recruiter or hiring team to ensure your organization retains full decision control. Please contact your recruiter for further assistance.

If you've experienced a technical issue that prevented you from completing your mock interview, please provide as much detail as possible so we can assist you further.

Issue:
I would like to request a rescheduling of my  company "Company Name" HackerRank assessment due to unforeseen circumstances 
that prevented me from attending the test at the scheduled time.
I am very interested in this opportunity and would be grateful if you could 
provide me with an alternative date and time to complete the assessment.
Thank you for your understanding and support.
Response: To reschedule your HackerRank assessment, please follow these steps: 1. Log in to your HackerRank for Work account. 2. Go to the Interviews > Interview List. 3. Click the interview you want to reschedule. 4. Click Invite Participants. 5. Update the Date, Time, Interview Duration, and Time zone fields as needed. 6. Click Save and Send Email. Note: Make sure you have created and scheduled an interview that has not yet been conducted. If you need further assistance, you can submit a support request on the platform using this form: https://portal.usepylon.com/hackerrank-support/forms/customer-request-form

Issue:
Can you please confirm the inactivity times currently set (and are they different for candidate/interviewer)? 
Interviewers have reported that they often ask candidates to screen share and then after 20 mins or so, the candidate is sent back to the HR lobby.

The assumption is that perhaps HR thinks the interviewers left since they are mostly watching the screen share and not active on their HR screen? 
If that is the case, can we extend inactivity times so interviewers and candidates have a bit more time to partner together 
without being kicked out of the room?
Subject: Candidate inactivity help
Response: To address the issue of candidates being sent back to the HR lobby after 20 minutes of inactivity, you can extend the inactivity times for both interviewers and candidates. This will allow them to collaborate without being kicked out of the room. You can do this by adjusting the inactivity settings in your HackerRank account. Please note that inactivity times can be different for candidates and interviewers.

Issue:
Hello! I am trying to remove an interviewer from the platform. I am not seeing this as an option when I select the three dots next to their name. 
Can you let me know how to do this?
Subject: How to Remove a User
Response: To remove an interviewer from the platform, you cannot directly delete them from the interviewer list. However, you can remove them from a specific test or interview by following these steps: Log in to your HackerRank for Work account, go to the Tests tab, select the test you want to modify, go to the Interviewers tab, and click the 'X' next to the interviewer's name to remove them. Alternatively, if you want to delete an entire interview, you can do so by going to the Interviews > Interview List, clicking the more options menu next to the interview, and then clicking Delete Interview.

Issue: Hi, please pause our subscription. We have stopped all hiring efforts for now.
Subject: Subscription pause
Response: To pause your subscription, follow these steps: 1. Log in to your HackerRank for Work account. 2. Click on the profile icon in the top-right corner and select Settings. 3. Navigate to the Billing section under Subscription. 4. Click the Cancel Plan button and select the desired pause duration (minimum 1 month, maximum 12 months). 5. Click Confirm Pause.

Issue: I want Claude to stop crawling by website
Subject: Website Data crawl
Response: To block Anthropic's crawler from your website, you can add the following directive to your site's robots.txt file: 'User-agent: Anthropic/Bot'. Alternatively, you can email claudebot@anthropic.com from an email address associated with your domain to request that your site be blocked from crawling. Please note that Anthropic respects industry-standard directives in robots.txt and honors 'do not crawl' signals.

If you're having trouble, you can call the Visa Global Customer Assistance Services (GCAS) at +1 303 967 1090 for assistance. Additionally, you can also contact your bank or credit card company for help.

Issue: I am facing multiple issues in my project. all requests to claude with aws bedrock is failing
Subject: Issues in Project
Response: To troubleshoot issues with Claude in Amazon Bedrock, first ensure you have access to Claude by visiting the Amazon Bedrock console. Check the AWS Regions where Claude models are available. If you're experiencing authentication issues, verify that your ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is set correctly and that you've trusted the key in Claude Code. If you're using Bedrock, confirm that 'aws sts get-caller-identity' works and that AWS_REGION is set to a region where your model is enabled. If the issue persists, check that your account has access to the requested Claude model and that the model is enabled in your organization's admin settings.

Issue: one of my employee has left. I want to remove them from our hackerrank hiring account
Subject: Employee leaving the company
Response: To remove an employee from your HackerRank hiring account, you need to deactivate or remove them as a user. Here are the steps: 1. Log in to your HackerRank for Work account. 2. Click on your profile icon in the upper-right corner and select Admin Panel. 3. In the Admin Panel, click on your profile icon and select User Management. 4. Search for the user you want to remove. 5. Click on the three dots next to their name and select Deactivate. Alternatively, if you want to completely remove them, click on the three dots and select Delete. Note: You can only delete a user if they are not part of any teams or if you have removed them from all teams first.

Issue: i am a professor in a college and wanted to setup a claude lti key for my students
Subject: Claude for students
Response: To set up a Claude LTI key for your students, follow these steps: 1. In Canvas, sign in as an administrator and navigate to Admin -> Developer Keys. 2. Click '+ Developer Key' then '+ LTI Key.' 3. Enter the required information, including Key Name, Description, Redirect URIs, Title, Target Link URI, OpenID Connect Initiation Url, and JWK method. 4. Under Additional Settings, toggle Privacy Level to Public. 5. Under Placements, remove the defaults and add 'Course Navigation' and 'Assignment Edit' as the options. 6. Click 'Save.' 7. Toggle the state to On. For more information, refer to the 'Set up the Claude LTI in Canvas by Instructure' article.

Issue: i am in US Virgin Islands and the merchant is saying i have to spend minimum 10$ on my VISA card, why so?
Subject: Visa card minimum spend
Response: In the US Virgin Islands, a merchant is allowed to require a minimum transaction amount of $10 for credit card transactions, according to Visa rules. However, this does not apply to debit card transactions. If you encounter any issues with a merchant refusing to accept your Visa card due to a minimum or maximum amount requirement on a debit card or a credit card transaction below $10, please notify your Visa card issuer.
